name: poe2-toolkit
description: Framework-agnostic toolkit for Path of Exile 2 data: a shared GGPK access layer plus extractors and renderers for the passive tree, items, gems and runes. Code only - ships no game data or art.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/ggpk && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/tree-core && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/tree-react && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/tree-extractor && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/item-extractor && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/gem-extractor && npm run build -w @poe2-toolkit/rune-extractor
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
